top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says this is how to play a market rotation — and one stock he’d buy
top_signals.summary: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said investors should use market pullbacks to selectively buy quality stocks rather than chase short-term rallies during sector rotations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
